failures.description: The required catalog search tool timed out, so the agent could not obtain product evidence needed to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan matched the user request: search the product catalog for available Electric Kettles sorted by ascending price. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the required arguments. The failure occurred when the ProductCatalogSearch dependency returned an explicit timeout error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError after 30000ms. This is an infrastructure/connectivity-style tool failure, not a malformed invocation, misunderstanding, or hallucination. The failure was not resolved later; the agent only produced an inability-to-complete answer.
